I've moved the "Add X" buttons from the top right to below the header in all 8 main pages:

1. **Agents** (`src/components/Agents.tsx`) - "New agent" button
2. **Simulations** (`src/app/simulations/page.tsx`) - "Add simulation" button
3. **Personas** (`src/app/personas/page.tsx`) - "Add persona" button
4. **Scenarios** (`src/app/scenarios/page.tsx`) - "Add scenario" button
5. **Tools** (`src/app/tools/page.tsx`) - "Add tool" button
6. **Tests/LLM Evaluation** (`src/app/tests/page.tsx`) - "Add test" button
7. **STT** (`src/app/stt/page.tsx`) - "New STT evaluation" button
8. **TTS** (`src/app/tts/page.tsx`) - "New TTS evaluation" button

The buttons are now positioned on the left side, below the header section (title and description). The parent container's `space-y-6` class ensures consistent vertical spacing between the header, button, and subsequent content.

                {

                  "content": "### About Page (&#96;/about&#96;)",

                },

                  "lineNumber": 727,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },

                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 729,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 730,
                  "content": "**Structure:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 731,
                  "content": "- Uses &#96;&lt;LandingHeader showLogoLink talkToUsHref=\"/login#join-community\" /&gt;&#96; - logo links to /login, \"Talk to us\" button links to login page's community section"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 732,
                  "content": "- Uses &#96;&lt;LandingFooter /&gt;&#96; - same footer as landing page",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 733,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 734,
                  "content": "**Content sections:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 836,
                  "content": "- &#96;onItemChange&#96;: Callback when nav item clicked",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 837,
                  "content": "- &#96;sidebarOpen&#96; / &#96;onSidebarToggle&#96;: Sidebar collapse state",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 838,
                  "content": "- &#96;customHeader&#96;: Optional React node for custom header content (left side of header bar)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 839,
                  "content": "- &#96;headerActions&#96;: Optional React node for action buttons beside user profile dropdown (right side of header bar)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 840,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 841,
                  "content": "### Detail Page Header Pattern",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 842,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 938,
                  "content": "/stt/[uuid]             # View STT evaluation results (polling + tabs)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 939,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 940,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 941,
                  "content": "**List Page:**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 942,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 943,
                  "content": "- Fetches jobs from &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=tts&#96; or &#96;GET /jobs?job_type=stt&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 944,
                  "content": "- Displays in sortable table with columns: Providers (as pills), Language, Status, Samples count, Created At",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 964,
                  "content": "- **Providers start unselected by default** - user must select at least 1 provider before evaluating",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 965,
                  "content": "- Evaluate button always enabled; clicking without providers shows red border around provider selection and switches to Settings tab",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 966,
                  "content": "- On submit: calls &#96;POST /[tts|stt]/evaluate&#96;, then redirects to &#96;/[tts|stt]/{uuid}&#96; using the returned &#96;task_id&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 967,
                  "content": "- Uses &#96;BackHeader&#96; component for back navigation to list page"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 968,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 969,
                  "content": "**Detail Page:**",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 970,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1085,
                  "content": "- TTS providers additionally have a &#96;voiceId&#96; field",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1086,
                  "content": "- **Provider display varies by context**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1087,
                  "content": "  - **New evaluation pages** (provider selection): Table format showing Label, Model, (Voice ID for TTS), and Website columns. Website column has external link icon that opens provider's website in new tab",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1088,
                  "content": "  - **List pages and detail pages**: Only label shown as pills (e.g., \"Deepgram\" not \"Deepgram (nova-3)\"), no website links"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1089,
                  "content": "  - &#96;getProviderLabel()&#96; helper returns just the label: &#96;provider.label&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1090,
                  "content": "- Providers without &#96;supportedLanguages&#96; are shown for all languages",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1091,
                  "content": "- When language changes, selected providers that don't support the new language are automatically deselected",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1106,
                  "content": "   - Simple dialogs: Backdrop click closes dialog directly",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1107,
                  "content": "   - Form dialogs with unsaved data: Backdrop click shows confirmation before closing (e.g., AddTestDialog)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1108,
                  "content": "   - Used for: New agent, New simulation, Delete confirmations, Add/Edit test",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1109,
                  "content": "   - **Large form dialogs** (like AddTestDialog): Use a header bar with name input and save button, flex-col layout with main content area below"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1110,
                  "content": "4. **Delete Confirmation**: Reusable &#96;DeleteConfirmationDialog&#96; component",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1111,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;isOpen&#96;, &#96;onClose&#96;, &#96;onConfirm&#96;, &#96;title&#96;, &#96;message&#96;, &#96;confirmText&#96;, &#96;isDeleting&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1112,
                  "content": "   - Shows loading spinner during deletion",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1223,
                  "content": "await apiDelete(&#96;/items/${id}&#96;, accessToken);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1224,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1225,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1226,
                  "content": "**For CRUD list pages, use &#96;useCrudResource&#96; hook:**"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1227,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1228,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1229,
                  "content": "import { useCrudResource } from \"@/hooks\";",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2158,
                  "content": "&lt;/div&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2159,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2160,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2161,
                  "content": "This pattern is used in: Tools, Personas, Scenarios, Metrics list pages, and Simulation Run results table."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2162,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2163,
                  "content": "### Polling for Async Tasks",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2164,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2402,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2403,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2404,
                  "content": "&lt;div className=\"relative w-full max-w-7xl h-[85vh] bg-background rounded-2xl shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden border border-border\"&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2405,
                  "content": "  {/* Header - fixed height with name input and action button */}"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2406,
                  "content": "  &lt;div className=\"h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-border flex-shrink-0\"&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2407,
                  "content": "    &lt;input",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2408,
                  "content": "      type=\"text\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2532,
                  "content": "6. **Icons**: Import from &#96;@/components/icons&#96; - all icons are centralized there (Heroicons outline style, 24x24 viewBox, strokeWidth 1.5 or 2)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2533,
                  "content": "7. **Reusable Components**: Use shared components from &#96;@/components/ui&#96; (Button, SearchInput, SlidePanel, etc.)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2534,
                  "content": "8. **API Calls**: Use &#96;@/lib/api&#96; utilities (apiGet, apiPost, apiPut, apiDelete) for consistent error handling",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2535,
                  "content": "9. **CRUD Resources**: Use &#96;useCrudResource&#96; hook from &#96;@/hooks&#96; for standard list pages"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2536,
                  "content": "10. **Error Handling**: Try-catch with console.error and user-facing error states",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2537,
                  "content": "11. **Form Validation**: Use &#96;validationAttempted&#96; state to show errors only after submit attempt",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2538,
                  "content": "12. **Optimistic Updates**: Update local state immediately, then sync with backend",
                  "isContextLine": true
                }
              ]
            }
          ],
          "totalLines": 120,
          "totalMatchedLines": 18
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

Done! I've extracted the Add/Edit Tool dialog into a new reusable component.

**Changes made:**

1. **Created `/src/components/AddToolDialog.tsx`** - A new component containing:
   - All form state (toolName, toolDescription, parameters)
   - All parameter manipulation helpers (updateParameterAtPath, addPropertyAtPath, etc.)
   - JSON Schema conversion helpers
   - Create/update/load tool API logic
   - The full sidebar UI

2. **Simplified `/src/app/tools/page.tsx`** - Reduced from ~1400 lines to ~350 lines:
   - Now imports and uses `AddToolDialog`
   - Manages only page-level state (tools list, search, delete dialog)
   - Passes callbacks to the dialog for updates

**Props for `AddToolDialog`:**
- `isOpen` - Controls dialog visibility
- `onClose` - Callback when dialog closes
- `editingToolUuid` - UUID of tool being edited (null for new)
- `backendAccessToken` - Auth token for API calls
- `onToolsUpdated` - Callback with updated tools list after create/update

                {
                  "lineNumber": 1214,
                  "content": "      - **Processing state display**: When a provider has &#96;success === null&#96; and no results yet, shows all test names from &#96;testNames&#96; prop with yellow running indicators (similar to TestRunnerDialog)"

                  "lineNumber": 1215,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1217,
                  "content": "      - **Merged providers**: &#96;getProvidersToDisplay()&#96; function merges &#96;modelResults&#96; from API with placeholders for any models that don't have results yet",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1219,
                  "content": "      - **Header status badge**: Uses &#96;StatusBadge&#96; component (same as STT/TTS evaluation pages) to show task status (\"Queued\" with gray badge, \"Running\" with yellow badge) plus spinner while benchmark is in progress",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1220,
                  "content": "    - **Props for viewing past runs**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1221,
                  "content": "      - &#96;taskId&#96;: The run UUID to fetch results for",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1222,
                  "content": "      - &#96;tests&#96;: Array converted from &#96;pastRun.results&#96; to show test names while loading (TestRunnerDialog only)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1223,
                  "content": "      - &#96;initialRunStatus&#96;: Determines initialization behavior (TestRunnerDialog only)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1224,
                  "content": "    - **Callback props for coordinated updates**:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1225,
                  "content": "      - &#96;onRunCreated&#96; / &#96;onBenchmarkCreated&#96;: Notifies parent when a new run/benchmark is created",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1226,
                  "content": "      - &#96;onStatusUpdate&#96;: Called during polling (only when &#96;isRunning&#96; is true) to sync status changes back to parent (TestRunnerDialog only)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1227,
                  "content": "      - Prevents duplicate polling and keeps table/dialog in sync",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1228,
                  "content": "    - **Re-initialization prevention** (TestRunnerDialog - prevents flickering while ensuring polling starts on reopen):"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1229,
                  "content": "      - Uses THREE refs: &#96;wasOpenRef&#96;, &#96;initializedTaskIdRef&#96;, and &#96;pollingIntervalRef&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1230,
                  "content": "      - **Skip condition**: Only skips if ALL THREE conditions are true:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1231,
                  "content": "        1. &#96;wasOpenRef.current&#96; - dialog was already open (not transitioning from closed→open)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1236,
                  "content": "      - Always clears existing polling interval before starting new one",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1237,
                  "content": "      - Refs and intervals are cleared when dialog closes or when starting a fresh run",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1238,
                  "content": "      - &#96;onStatusUpdate&#96; only called for in-progress runs (when &#96;isRunning&#96; is true)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1239,
                  "content": "    - **Auth token guard** (TestRunnerDialog): The useEffect must wait for &#96;backendAccessToken&#96; before starting polling:"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1240,
                  "content": "      - Returns early if &#96;backendAccessToken&#96; is not available",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1241,
                  "content": "      - Includes &#96;backendAccessToken&#96; in useEffect dependency array",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1242,
                  "content": "      - This ensures polling re-attempts when session loads (token becomes available)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2308,
                  "content": "- &#96;src/app/tts/[uuid]/page.tsx&#96; - TTS evaluation detail page",

                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2314,
                  "content": "**Status Types:**",

                  "lineNumber": 2315,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2328,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2329,
                  "content": "**Polling stop conditions**: Polling stops when status is &#96;\"done\"&#96; OR &#96;\"failed\"&#96; (not just on fetch errors). Initial fetch also skips starting polling if status is already terminal.",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2330,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {

                  "content": "**Files using &#96;POLLING_INTERVAL_MS&#96;:** TestRunnerDialog, BenchmarkResultsDialog (with intermediate results support), TestsTabContent, STT/TTS evaluation pages, simulation run page."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2332,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2333,
                  "content": "### Usage Limits and Toast Notifications",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2334,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2457,

Done! Here's a summary of the changes:

**`AddToolDialog.tsx`:**
- Added `ToolType` union type (`"client" | "webhook"`)
- Added `toolType` prop to the component
- Created `TOOL_TYPE_CONFIG` constant with different configurations for each type:
  - **Structured output tool (client)**: "Structured output tools enable agents to produce data in a defined format. When the agent needs to extract specific information (like a customer name or order details), it can call this tool to return data with a consistent structure."
  - **Webhook tool**: "Webhook tools allow agents to call external APIs or services. When the agent needs to perform an action (like sending a notification or fetching data from an external system), it can trigger a webhook with structured parameters."
- Header now shows "Add structured output tool" / "Edit structured output tool" or "Add webhook tool" / "Edit webhook tool" based on the type

**`tools/page.tsx`:**
- Added `toolType` state to track which type is being created
- Updated `openAddToolDialog` to accept a tool type parameter
- Both "Add webhook tool" buttons now open the dialog with webhook type
- Both "Add structured output tool" buttons open the dialog with client type
- Removed unused `toast` import

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
No linter errors. The implementation is complete. Let me summarize the changes:

1. Added webhook-specific state variables: `webhookMethod`, `webhookUrl`, `responseTimeout`
2. Updated `resetForm` to reset these fields
3. Added the UI for the webhook-specific fields (Method dropdown, URL input, Response timeout slider) - only shown when `toolType === "webhook"`

5. Updated `updateTool` similarly
6. Updated `loadToolData` to load webhook-specific fields when editing</details></think>

---

Done! I've added the webhook-specific fields to the `AddToolDialog`. Here's what was added:

**New state variables:**
- `webhookMethod` - GET, POST, PUT, or DELETE (default: POST)
- `webhookUrl` - The webhook endpoint URL
- `responseTimeout` - Timeout in seconds (default: 20, range: 1-120)

**UI changes (only visible for webhook tools):**
- **Method dropdown** - Select HTTP method (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE)
- **URL input** - Text field with placeholder `https://example.com/{hi}/webhook`
- **Response timeout slider** - Range slider from 1-120 seconds with current value displayed

**Validation:**
- URL is required for webhook tools (shows red border if empty after validation attempt)

**API integration:**
- Creates/updates tools with webhook config: `{ method, url, timeout }`
- Loads existing webhook config when editing a tool

---

Done! Added URL validation for webhook tools:

**Validation logic:**
- Checks URL is not empty
- Validates URL format using JavaScript's `URL` constructor
- Ensures protocol is `http:` or `https:`

**Error messages:**
- "URL is required" - when URL field is empty
- "Please enter a valid URL (e.g., https://example.com/webhook)" - when URL format is invalid

The validation is triggered when clicking "Add tool" or "Save", and shows a red border on the input field along with an error message below it.

The slider should now show a white filled portion from the start to the current value.

---

Done! The URL validation is now stricter:

**Valid URLs:**
- `https://example.com/webhook`
- `http://localhost:3000/api`
- `https://api.example.com/webhook`

**Invalid URLs:**
- `https://asd` - no TLD (no dot in hostname)
- `https://example` - no TLD
- `ftp://example.com` - wrong protocol

The validation now requires the hostname to either be `localhost` or contain a dot (for domain.tld format).

---

Done! I replaced the gradient approach with a more reliable method using separate div elements:

1. **Unfilled track** - A full-width muted background div
2. **Filled track** - A foreground-colored div with dynamic width based on value
3. **Input** - Positioned on top with transparent background

This approach works consistently across browsers because it doesn't rely on the browser rendering the input's background gradient correctly.

Done! I've added the Headers section for webhook tools with:

**Features:**
- **Add header button** - Creates a new header card
- **Type dropdown** - Choose between "Secret" or "Value"
- **Name input** - The header name (e.g., "Authorization")
- **Value input** (when type is "Value") - Direct header value
- **Add new secret button** (when type is "Secret") - Placeholder for secret management
- **Delete button** - Remove the header

**Data flow:**
- Headers are stored in state as `webhookHeaders` array
- Each header has: `id`, `type`, `name`, `value`, `secretId`
- Headers are included in the webhook config when creating/updating tools
- Existing headers are loaded when editing a webhook tool
- Only headers with non-empty names are sent to the API

Done! I've added the Query parameters section for webhook tools and removed the Parameters section from webhook tools. Here's what was implemented:

**Query Parameters section (webhook tools only):**
- **Data type dropdown** - String, Number, Integer, Boolean
- **Identifier input** - The parameter name (e.g., `user_id`)
- **Required checkbox** - Whether the parameter is mandatory
- **Value Type dropdown** - "LLM Prompt" or "Static Value"
- **Description textarea** - With helper text explaining its purpose
- **Enum Values** - Optional predefined values with:
  - Input field + add button
  - Enter key support for quick adding
  - Tags display with remove buttons
  - Helper text explaining behavior

**Changes made:**
1. Parameters section now only shows for structured output tools (`toolType === "client"`)
2. Query parameters section only shows for webhook tools (`toolType === "webhook"`)
3. Query parameters are saved to `config.webhook.queryParameters` in the API
4. Existing query parameters are loaded when editing a webhook tool

4. Replaced the custom query parameter cards with ParameterCard component5. Updated API config building to use buildParametersConfig for query parameters6. Updated loading to use parseParameterSchema for query parameters</details></think>

---

Done! I've simplified the Query parameters section to be exactly the same as the Parameters section:

**Changes made:**
1. Query parameters now use the same `Parameter` type as structured output parameters
2. Removed the custom UI (enum values, value type dropdown, identifier field)
3. Now uses the same `ParameterCard` component as the Parameters section
4. Added matching handlers: `handleQueryUpdateAtPath`, `handleQueryRemoveAtPath`, `handleQueryAddPropertyAtPath`, `handleQuerySetItemsAtPath`, `addQueryParameter`
5. Updated API to use `buildParametersConfig(queryParameters)` - same format as parameters
6. Updated loading to use `parseParameterSchema` - same parsing as parameters

The Query parameters section now has the exact same fields and behavior as the Parameters section for structured output tools.

Documentation updated. The key changes documented:

1. **Clear section separation**: Documented that Parameters section is for structured output tools only, while webhook tools have Headers and Query parameters sections
2. **Query parameters use ParameterCard**: Explicitly noted that query parameters use the same `ParameterCard` component with identical fields and behavior (data type, name, required, description, nested object/array support)
3. **Same Parameter type**: Both `parameters` and `queryParameters` arrays use the same `Parameter` type
4. **Query parameter handlers**: Documented the mirrored handlers (`handleQueryUpdateAtPath`, etc.) that operate on `queryParameters` state
5. **API format**: Query parameters use `buildParametersConfig()` - same format as structured output parameters
6. **Section styling**: Noted that all section containers use `bg-muted/50` for visual distinction

Done! I've added the Body parameters section for webhook tools. Here's what was added:

**Changes:**
1. **New state**: `bodyDescription` and `bodyParameters` for managing body content
2. **Body parameter handlers**: Same pattern as query parameters (`handleBodyUpdateAtPath`, `handleBodyRemoveAtPath`, `handleBodyAddPropertyAtPath`, `handleBodySetItemsAtPath`, `addBodyParameter`)
3. **UI Section**: Shows only for POST, PUT, PATCH methods with:
   - Description textarea with helper text
   - Properties section using `ParameterCard` (same as query params and structured output params)
   - "Add property" button
4. **API integration**: Body config is included in webhook config only for POST/PUT/PATCH methods
5. **Load support**: Existing body parameters are loaded when editing a tool
6. **Consistent styling**: All section containers now use `bg-muted/50`

The changes are complete. Let me summarize what was done:1. Added `type: toolType` to the config object when creating and updating tools in AddToolDialog.tsx

---

Done. Here's what was changed:

1. **AddToolDialog.tsx** - Added `type: toolType` to the config object when creating and updating tools. This stores whether the tool is "webhook" or "client" (structured output).

2. **tools/page.tsx** - Updated `openEditToolDialog` to read the type from the tool's config when opening for editing. If `config.type` is "webhook", it uses webhook mode; otherwise defaults to "client" (structured output).

The config now stores:
```javascript
config: {
  type: "webhook" | "client",  // Tool type
  parameters: [...],            // For structured output
  webhook: {...}               // For webhook tools
}
```

                  "content": "     - Dropdown contains: user info, theme switcher, logout button",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1262,
                  "content": "     - Click outside closes dropdown (uses &#96;useRef&#96; + &#96;mousedown&#96; event)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1263,
                  "content": "7. **Downloadable Tables**: Reusable &#96;DownloadableTable&#96; component for data tables with CSV export",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1264,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;columns&#96; (array of &#96;{key, header, render?}&#96;), &#96;data&#96;, &#96;filename&#96;, &#96;title&#96;"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1265,
                  "content": "   - Includes \"Download CSV\" button in top-right corner",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1266,
                  "content": "   - Used in: BenchmarkResultsDialog, STT/TTS detail pages (&#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96;, &#96;/tts/[uuid]&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1267,
                  "content": "   - Custom cell rendering via optional &#96;render&#96; function in column definition",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1268,
                  "content": "8. **Charts with PNG Export**: &#96;LeaderboardBarChart&#96; component includes built-in PNG download",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1269,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;title&#96;, &#96;data&#96;, &#96;height?&#96;, &#96;yDomain?&#96;, &#96;formatTooltip?&#96;, &#96;colorMap?&#96;, &#96;filename?&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1270,
                  "content": "   - \"PNG\" download button in top-right corner of chart card",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1271,
                  "content": "   - Exports at 2x resolution with white background for quality",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1272,
                  "content": "   - Used in: BenchmarkResultsDialog, SpeechToTextEvaluation, TextToSpeechEvaluation",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1273,
                  "content": "9. **LLM Selector Modal**: &#96;LLMSelectorModal&#96; from &#96;@/components/agent-tabs/LLMSelectorModal&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1274,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;isOpen&#96;, &#96;onClose&#96;, &#96;selectedLLM&#96;, &#96;onSelect&#96;, &#96;availableProviders?&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2274,
                  "content": "| **Agents, Simulations**       | &#96;[1fr_1fr_auto]&#96; or &#96;[1fr_1fr_auto_auto]&#96; | Equal-width data columns, auto action buttons                 |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2275,
                  "content": "| **Tools, Scenarios, Metrics** | &#96;[200px_1fr_auto]&#96;                        | Fixed 200px name column, flexible description, auto actions   |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2276,
                  "content": "| **Personas**                  | &#96;[200px_1fr_100px_100px_120px_auto]&#96;      | Fixed name, flexible characteristics, fixed attribute columns |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2277,
                  "content": "| **Simulation Runs**           | &#96;[1fr_1fr_1fr_1fr]&#96;                       | Four equal columns (Name, Status, Type, Created At)           |"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2278,
                  "content": "| **Tests**                     | &#96;[1fr_1fr_auto]&#96;                          | Equal-width name and type columns                             |",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2279,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2280,
                  "content": "The pattern is: use fixed widths (e.g., &#96;200px&#96;) for short columns like Name/Label, &#96;1fr&#96; for flexible content columns like Description/Characteristics, and &#96;auto&#96; for action buttons."
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2281,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2282,

                  "lineNumber": 2283,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },

                  "lineNumber": 2557,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2558,
                  "content": "  {/* Header - fixed height with name input and action button */}",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2559,
                  "content": "  &lt;div className=\"h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-6 border-b border-border flex-shrink-0\"&gt;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2560,
                  "content": "    &lt;input",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2561,
                  "content": "      type=\"text\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2562,
                  "content": "      value={name}",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2563,
                  "content": "      onChange={(e) =&gt; setName(e.target.value)}",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2564,
                  "content": "      placeholder=\"Name\"",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2585,
                  "content": "- Main content uses &#96;flex-1 overflow-hidden&#96; to fill remaining vertical space",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2586,
                  "content": "- If using multi-column layout, wrap columns in the Main Content Area div",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2587,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2588,
                  "content": "**Auto-resizing textareas** (used in AddTestDialog conversation history):"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2589,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2590,
                  "content": "&#96;&#96;&#96;tsx",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2591,
                  "content": "&lt;textarea",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2592,
                  "content": "  value={content}",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2593,
                  "content": "  onChange={(e) =&gt; {",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2594,
                  "content": "    updateContent(e.target.value);",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2595,
                  "content": "    // Auto-resize textarea",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2596,
                  "content": "    e.target.style.height = \"auto\";",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2597,
                  "content": "    e.target.style.height = &#96;${e.target.scrollHeight}px&#96;;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2598,
                  "content": "  }}",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2765,
                  "content": "  - **Gotcha**: Without clearing at the start of the effect, re-renders or dependency changes can create multiple concurrent intervals, causing excessive API requests",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2766,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2767,
                  "content": "- **Dialog close prevention**: Disable dialog close while async operations (delete, save) are in progress",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2768,
                  "content": "- **Unsaved changes confirmation**: Form dialogs (like AddTestDialog) should show a confirmation dialog when user clicks backdrop, asking \"Discard changes?\" with Cancel/Discard buttons"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2769,
                  "content": "- **Key-based lookup with freeze-on-complete for live-updating dialogs**: When a dialog shows data that can complete (e.g., transcript with audio):",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2770,
                  "content": "  1. Store a unique identifier (e.g., &#96;selectedSimulationKey = simulation.simulation_name&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2771,
                  "content": "  2. Use a ref to store frozen data: &#96;frozenSimulationRef = useRef&lt;DataType | null&gt;(null)&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2772,
                  "content": "  3. Use &#96;useMemo&#96; to decide: if frozen and complete → return frozen; if just completed → freeze it; if in progress → return live data",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2773,
                  "content": "  4. Clear the frozen ref when dialog closes",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2774,
                  "content": "  5. This prevents re-renders and media reload for completed items while allowing live updates for in-progress items",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2775,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2776,
                  "content": "### UI Patterns",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2777,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2778,
                  "content": "- **Sortable tables**: Store both raw date (&#96;updatedAtRaw&#96;) for sorting and formatted date (&#96;updatedAt&#96;) for display",
                  "isContextLine": true
                }
              ]
            }
          ],
          "totalLines": 118,
          "totalMatchedLines": 10
        }
      }
    }

}

                {
                  "lineNumber": 1246,
                  "content": "### Component Patterns"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1247,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1248,
                  "content": "1. **Tab Navigation**: Used in agent detail and simulation detail pages",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1249,
                  "content": "   - Tabs sync with URL query param (&#96;?tab=agent&#96;, &#96;?tab=tools&#96;, etc.)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1250,
                  "content": "   - Use &#96;useSearchParams&#96; to read initial tab value",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1251,
                  "content": "   - Use &#96;window.history.replaceState&#96; to update URL without navigation side effects (avoids title reset issues caused by &#96;router.push&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1252,
                  "content": "2. **Sidebar Panels**: Slide-in panels for create/edit forms",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1253,
                  "content": "   - **Preferred**: Use &#96;SlidePanel&#96; and &#96;SlidePanelFooter&#96; from &#96;@/components/ui&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1254,
                  "content": "   - Width: 40% of viewport, min 500px (customizable via &#96;width&#96; prop)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1255,
                  "content": "   - Backdrop click closes panel",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1256,
                  "content": "   - Used for: Tools, Personas, Scenarios creation/editing",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1257,
                  "content": "3. **Modal Dialogs**: Centered overlays for confirmations and simple forms",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1258,
                  "content": "   - Simple dialogs: Backdrop click closes dialog directly",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1259,
                  "content": "   - Form dialogs with unsaved data: Backdrop click shows confirmation before closing (e.g., AddTestDialog)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1260,
                  "content": "   - Used for: New agent, New simulation, Delete confirmations, Add/Edit test",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1261,
                  "content": "   - **Large form dialogs** (like AddTestDialog): Use a header bar with name input and save button, flex-col layout with main content area below",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1262,
                  "content": "4. **Delete Confirmation**: Reusable &#96;DeleteConfirmationDialog&#96; component"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1263,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;isOpen&#96;, &#96;onClose&#96;, &#96;onConfirm&#96;, &#96;title&#96;, &#96;message&#96;, &#96;confirmText&#96;, &#96;isDeleting&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1264,
                  "content": "   - Shows loading spinner during deletion",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1265,
                  "content": "   - **Skip confirmation for empty items**: When deleting empty rows (e.g., in TTS/STT evaluation input), call &#96;deleteRow()&#96; directly instead of showing confirmation dialog",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1266,
                  "content": "5. **Toast Notifications**: Bottom-right success toasts",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1267,
                  "content": "   - Auto-dismiss after 3 seconds",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1268,
                  "content": "   - Manual dismiss button",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1269,
                  "content": "   - Used after successful save operations",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1270,
                  "content": "6. **Header Actions (AppLayout)**: Top-right section of header contains:",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1271,
                  "content": "   - **User Profile Dropdown**: Avatar button showing Google image or placeholder (first letter on purple background)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1272,
                  "content": "     - Dropdown contains: user info, theme switcher, logout button",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1273,
                  "content": "     - Click outside closes dropdown (uses &#96;useRef&#96; + &#96;mousedown&#96; event)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1274,
                  "content": "7. **Downloadable Tables**: Reusable &#96;DownloadableTable&#96; component for data tables with CSV export"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1275,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;columns&#96; (array of &#96;{key, header, render?}&#96;), &#96;data&#96;, &#96;filename&#96;, &#96;title&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1276,
                  "content": "   - Includes \"Download CSV\" button in top-right corner",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1277,
                  "content": "   - Used in: BenchmarkResultsDialog, STT/TTS detail pages (&#96;/stt/[uuid]&#96;, &#96;/tts/[uuid]&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1278,
                  "content": "   - Custom cell rendering via optional &#96;render&#96; function in column definition",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1279,
                  "content": "8. **Charts with PNG Export**: &#96;LeaderboardBarChart&#96; component includes built-in PNG download",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1280,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;title&#96;, &#96;data&#96;, &#96;height?&#96;, &#96;yDomain?&#96;, &#96;formatTooltip?&#96;, &#96;colorMap?&#96;, &#96;filename?&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1281,
                  "content": "   - \"PNG\" download button in top-right corner of chart card",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1282,
                  "content": "   - Exports at 2x resolution with white background for quality",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1283,
                  "content": "   - Used in: BenchmarkResultsDialog, SpeechToTextEvaluation, TextToSpeechEvaluation",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1284,
                  "content": "9. **LLM Selector Modal**: &#96;LLMSelectorModal&#96; from &#96;@/components/agent-tabs/LLMSelectorModal&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1285,
                  "content": "   - Props: &#96;isOpen&#96;, &#96;onClose&#96;, &#96;selectedLLM&#96;, &#96;onSelect&#96;, &#96;availableProviders?&#96;",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1286,
                  "content": "   - Optional &#96;availableProviders&#96; prop for filtering available models (used in BenchmarkDialog)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1287,
                  "content": "   - Used in: AgentTabContent (settings), BenchmarkDialog (model comparison)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1288,
                  "content": "10. **Native Link Navigation**: List items use Next.js &#96;&lt;Link&gt;&#96; components for browser-native right-click support",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1289,
                  "content": "    - Enables \"Open in new tab\" via browser's native context menu",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2683,
                  "content": "   - Types: PascalCase with descriptive suffix (e.g., &#96;AgentData&#96;, &#96;ToolData&#96;)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2684,
                  "content": "5. **Files**: One main component per file, helper components at bottom of same file",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2685,
                  "content": "6. **Icons**: Import from &#96;@/components/icons&#96; - all icons are centralized there (Heroicons outline style, 24x24 viewBox, strokeWidth 1.5 or 2)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2686,
                  "content": "7. **Reusable Components**: Use shared components from &#96;@/components/ui&#96; (Button, SearchInput, SlidePanel, etc.)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2687,
                  "content": "8. **API Calls**: Use &#96;@/lib/api&#96; utilities (apiGet, apiPost, apiPut, apiDelete) for consistent error handling",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2688,
                  "content": "9. **CRUD Resources**: Use &#96;useCrudResource&#96; hook from &#96;@/hooks&#96; for standard list pages",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2689,
                  "content": "10. **Error Handling**: Try-catch with console.error and user-facing error states",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2690,
                  "content": "11. **Form Validation**: Use &#96;validationAttempted&#96; state to show errors only after submit attempt",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2691,
                  "content": "12. **Optimistic Updates**: Update local state immediately, then sync with backend",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2692,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2693,
                  "content": "---",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2694,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2695,
                  "content": "## Gotchas &amp; Edge Cases",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2696,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2697,
                  "content": "### API Calls",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2698,
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2699,
                  "content": "- **Preferred: Use &#96;@/lib/api&#96; utilities** - &#96;apiGet&#96;, &#96;apiPost&#96;, &#96;apiPut&#96;, &#96;apiDelete&#96; handle headers, 401 errors, and JSON parsing automatically",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2700,
                  "content": "- **For CRUD pages**: Use &#96;useCrudResource&#96; hook from &#96;@/hooks&#96; for standardized list/create/update/delete patterns",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2701,
                  "content": "- **JWT authentication required**: All API calls must include &#96;Authorization: Bearer ${backendAccessToken}&#96; header (handled automatically by API utilities)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                }
              ]

---

Done. I've made the following changes:

1. **AddToolDialog.tsx**:
   - When opening a new structured output tool (`toolType === "client"`), one default parameter is automatically added
   - Pass `hideDelete={parameters.length === 1}` to `ParameterCard` so the delete button is hidden when there's only one parameter

2. **ParameterCard.tsx**:
   - Added `hideDelete?: boolean` prop to the component
   - Delete button is now hidden when `hideDelete` is true (in addition to being hidden for array items)
